title: mahdidjemaci/production-rag

title: zlatko-lakisic/agentic-orchestration

title: ronniwheellike973/Mini-Agent

title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse

title: Almaskhan123/WeKnora
summary: 🔗 Connect and enhance your communication with WeKnora, a powerful platform for seamless integration and interaction in WeChat services.

title: rupertgermann/open-recall
summary: Privacy-focused, local-first Personal Knowledge Management powered by GraphRAG. Ingest articles, notes & PDFs, then chat with your knowledge using hybrid vector + graph search. Runs locally with Ollama. 100% AI-written.

title: hossbit/comai-linux-assistant
summary: Local AI Linux terminal assistant written in Bash. Explain commands, analyze files and logs, and use local LLMs or OpenAI-compatible APIs.

title: clidey/whodb
summary: Where data access meets operational intelligence

title: aaronnat23/disp8ch
summary: Self-hosted AI workspace where chat becomes visual workflows, multi-agent operations, and reviewable automations. Local memory; local or cloud models

title: amicalhq/amical
summary: 🎙️ AI Dictation App - Open Source and Local-first ⚡ Type 3x faster, no keyboard needed. 🆓 Powered by open source models, works offline, fast and accurate.

title: dragoshont/apprenticeops
summary: Open, reproducible benchmark for small, quantized, fully-offline local LLMs as homelab ops assistants — profiling quality × safety × energy together and reducing model choice to a measured Pareto front. arXiv preprint → NeurIPS D&B track. Human-guided, AI-assisted.

title: snflwr-ai/snflwr.ai
summary: K-12 safe AI tutoring platform — privacy-first, fully offline, backend-enforced content filtering with parental oversight

summary: Self-hosted Discord bot: local Ollama LLM chat, economy, casino games, and human-like chess. Python + MariaDB + Docker.

summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.
